title: Fitness
summary: Activities that get you moving and feeling strong.
beginnerTip: Start with something fun, not extreme.

title: Rock Climbing
summary: A fun physical activity that combines movement, focus, and problem solving.

title: Zumba
summary: A dance-based workout with high energy and music.
beginnerTip: Wear comfortable shoes and just follow along.

title: Cycling
summary: A versatile hobby for fitness, commuting, or outdoor exploration.
beginnerTip: Start with a short flat route.
